title: Equipal
subheading: Your best friend for managing your horse life 🐴
description: This android app is my personal project, serving as an activity tracker helping you to save and evaluate workout sessions, rest days and more for your horse.
list: Choose between several types of acitivities
Evaluate the feeling, exertion and add notes
See statistics over the past month

title: SunSip
description: During my internship i worked with a team on a webshop that sells beverages. I did both frontend and backend work. Handling membership functionality like login, register, favourites and user profiles.
